message:
feat(stdio): add strvisx + strnvisx + strunvisx + strnunvisx (bd-r24d6)

NetBSD vis(3) extended-length variants — process binary buffers
that may contain embedded NUL bytes (unlike the NUL-terminated
strvis/strnvis quartet). Companion to bd-i18zl (strvis family)
and bd-7om4b (vis/nvis single-byte encoders).

* strvisx(dst, src, srclen, flags) and strnvisx(dst, dlen, src,
  srclen, flags) take an explicit srclen and reuse the existing
  core::stdio::vis::strvis_to_vec primitive (which already
  operates on a byte slice and ignores NUL termination).
* strunvisx(dst, src, flags) and strnunvisx(dst, dlen, src, flags)
  accept a flags parameter for libutil API compat — current
  decoder is mode-agnostic so the parameter has no effect (libutil
  uses it for VIS_HTTP_STYLE / VIS_GLOB which we don't yet
  implement).

10 abi integration tests covering: buffer with embedded NUL is
encoded correctly, VIS_OCTAL flag renders \\NNN, zero srclen
returns 0, NULL dst rejection, strnvisx truncation + exact-fit,
strunvisx round-trip with NUL + 0xff, strnunvisx overflow
rejection, full payload round trip via ABI. Clippy-clean,
fmt-clean. All builds via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
